name: ait-audio-transcode-runner
description: Apps in Toss Unity SDK - build-time streaming-audio transcoder (MP3 re-encode via pure-WASM codecs). Invoked by AITAudioStreamTranscoder through the SDK's embedded Node.js. NOTE: npm license fields are MIT, but the compiled WASM cores embed LGPL-2.1 code (mpg123, LAME) - build-time tool only, never shipped in the .ait bundle.
